data.title: Workspace Group Announces Change in BlackRock’s Voting Rights
data.description:
Workspace Group plc R.E.I.T. ( (GB:WKP) ) has issued an announcement.

Workspace Group PLC has announced a change in the voting rights held by BlackRock, Inc., a major stakeholder. The notification indicates that BlackRock’s total voting rights in Workspace Group have decreased from 9.91% to 9.61%, reflecting a slight reduction in their stake. This adjustment in holdings could influence the company’s governance and decision-making processes, impacting its strategic direction and potentially affecting shareholder interests.

More about Workspace Group plc R.E.I.T.

Workspace Group PLC is a UK-based real estate investment trust (REIT) that specializes in providing flexible office spaces and commercial properties. The company primarily focuses on serving small to medium-sized enterprises (SMEs) and entrepreneurs, offering tailored work environments to support business growth and innovation.

data.title: International Paper Grants Incentive Stock Units to CFO
data.description:
The latest update is out from International Paper Co ( (IP) ).

International Paper Company announced the grant of Restricted Stock Units (RSUs) and Performance Stock Units (PSUs) to Lance T. Loeffler, the Senior Vice President and Chief Financial Officer, as part of their 2025 Long-Term Incentive Plan. These grants are designed to align the interests of key executives with company performance, with PSUs vesting based on performance objectives and RSUs vesting over three years, potentially impacting the company’s executive retention and motivation strategies.

More about International Paper Co

International Paper Company is a global leader in sustainable packaging solutions, focusing on the production and distribution of paper and packaging products. The company operates in the paper industry and is listed on the NYSE and LSE under the symbols IP and IPC, respectively.

data.title: Land Securities Group PLC Announces Change in Voting Rights
data.description:
Land Securities Group plc REIT ( (GB:LAND) ) has provided an update.

Land Securities Group PLC, a major player in the UK real estate sector, has announced a change in its voting rights structure due to BlackRock, Inc.’s acquisition or disposal of voting rights. BlackRock, a prominent investment management corporation based in the USA, now holds a total of 10.27% of voting rights in Land Securities Group PLC, reflecting a slight decrease from the previous notification. This adjustment in voting rights could influence the company’s governance and strategic decisions, impacting stakeholders and potentially altering its market position.

data.title: Synertone Communication Corporation Appoints New Auditor
data.description:
Synertone Communication Corporation ( (HK:1613) ) has shared an update.

Synertone Communication Corporation announced a change in its auditor, with HLB Hodgson Impey Cheng Limited resigning due to a disagreement over audit fees for the 2025 financial year. Prism Hong Kong Limited has been appointed as the new auditor, as recommended by the Audit Committee, due to its competitive audit fee proposal and extensive experience with listed companies in Hong Kong. The company assures that this change will not materially impact its operations or the 2025 audit, and it is considered beneficial for stakeholders.

More about Synertone Communication Corporation

Synertone Communication Corporation is a company incorporated in the Cayman Islands, operating within the communication industry. It is listed on the Stock Exchange of Hong Kong Limited and focuses on providing communication services.

data.title: Cirata PLC Sees Shift in Shareholder Voting Rights
data.description:
Wandisco ( (GB:CRTA) ) has provided an announcement.

Cirata PLC, a company involved in the acquisition or disposal of voting rights, has recently undergone a change in its shareholder structure. Far View Partners LP, based in Aspen, Colorado, has increased its voting rights in Cirata PLC from 5.45% to 6.19%, as of March 31, 2025. This change was facilitated through Goldman Sachs Securities (Nominees) Limited, based in London, UK. The notification of this change was officially made on April 1, 2025, indicating a strategic shift in the ownership dynamics of Cirata PLC.

data.title: Asia Pacific Wire & Cable Reports 2024 Financial Results with Revenue Growth
data.description:
The latest update is out from Asia Pac Wire &Cable ( (APWC) ).

On April 2, 2025, Asia Pacific Wire & Cable Corporation Limited announced its financial results for the year ended December 31, 2024, reporting a revenue increase of 11% to $472.7 million compared to 2023. The company experienced significant growth in its Thailand, North Asia, and Rest of World segments, with notable contributions from government projects and rising copper prices. Operating profit surged by 546.5% to $10 million, although net income slightly decreased by 9.9% to $3.5 million. The company is also exploring expansion opportunities in the Americas and South Asia, focusing on renewable energy and next-generation energy storage solutions.

More about Asia Pac Wire &Cable

Asia Pacific Wire & Cable Corporation Limited is a Bermuda-incorporated holding company with principal executive offices in Taiwan. It is engaged in the manufacture and distribution of power cables, telecommunications fiber optic cables, electronic and winding wires across Thailand, Singapore, Australia, the Greater China region, and other Asia Pacific markets. The company also provides project engineering services for high-voltage cable installations in power distribution infrastructure projects.

data.title: Real Estate Investors Plc Issues New Shares Following Executive Awards
data.description:
An announcement from Real Estate ate ate Investors ( (GB:RLE) ) is now available.

Real Estate Investors Plc has announced the issuance and allotment of 466,244 new Ordinary Shares following the vesting of share awards to key executives and employees. This move, which includes the exercise of rights by CEO Paul Bassi and Finance Director Marcus Daly, will increase the company’s issued share capital and adjust the voting rights, potentially impacting shareholder interests and market positioning.

More about Real Estate ate ate Investors

Real Estate Investors Plc is a publicly quoted, internally managed property investment company and Real Estate Investment Trust (REIT) with a diverse portfolio of mixed-use commercial properties in the Midlands, UK. The company, which converted to a REIT in 2015, focuses on optimizing shareholder returns through strategic asset sales and maintains a commitment to paying quarterly dividends.

data.title: BII Railway Transportation Technology Updates Dividend Entitlement Process
data.description:
BII Railway Transportation Technology Holdings Co., Ltd. ( (HK:1522) ) has shared an announcement.

BII Railway Transportation Technology Holdings Co., Ltd. announced an amendment regarding the determination of entitlement to its proposed final dividend for the year ended 31 December 2024. The register of members will be closed from 25 June 2025 to 27 June 2025 to facilitate this process, and shareholders must ensure their shares are registered by 24 June 2025 to qualify for the dividend. This clarification does not affect other information in the annual results announcement.

More about BII Railway Transportation Technology Holdings Co., Ltd.

BII Railway Transportation Technology Holdings Co., Ltd. operates in the railway transportation technology industry, focusing on providing advanced technology solutions and services for railway systems. The company is incorporated in the Cayman Islands and is listed on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange.

data.title: Real Matters to Release Q2 Fiscal 2025 Financial Results
data.description:
Real Matters Inc ( (TSE:REAL) ) has shared an announcement.

Real Matters Inc. announced it will release its second quarter fiscal 2025 financial results on April 30, 2025, before market opening. A conference call hosted by CEO Brian Lang and CFO Rodrigo Pinto will follow to discuss the results, with a webcast and transcript available post-call. This announcement is significant as it provides stakeholders with insights into the company’s financial health and operational performance, potentially impacting its market positioning and investor relations.

More about Real Matters Inc

Real Matters Inc. is a leading network management services provider for the mortgage lending and insurance industries. The company leverages proprietary technology and a vast network of independent qualified professionals to offer efficient services in mortgage lending and insurance. Their clientele includes top mortgage lenders in the U.S. and major banks and insurance companies in Canada. Real Matters is a prominent independent provider of residential real estate appraisals and title and mortgage closing services in the U.S., with headquarters in Markham, Ontario, and offices in Buffalo, New York, and Middletown, Rhode Island.
